productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Sandals
description: A borrowed-from-the-Romans style sandal with a twist, this sandal for men, with its sleek straps reference the standard gladiator footwear. Classy in an understated manner, these sandals from U.S. Polo Association have an undeniable sartorial authority. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Upper Leather upper with straps for the midfoot and forefoot Ankle strap looping around the ankle with a strap for the heel collar Buckled ankle strap Mildly padded footbed Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel Patterned lugs all over for grip on various surfaces with suction points Sandal care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
